Metadata.Changelog:
## Module
**Updated**
• Updated to `version-df7528517c6849f7`

**Fixed**
• `gethiddenproperty` crash
• Game leave crash
• `run_on_actor` crash
• Memory leak in `hookfunction`

**Changed**
• `getactorthreads`, `getluastate`, `getgamestate` now return `LuaStateProxy` instead of `thread`

**New: `LuaStateProxy`**
• `LuaStateProxy.new(): LuaStateProxy`
     Constructs a new `LuaStateProxy` based on the current Lua state
• `LuaStateProxy.Id: number`
     Unique identifier for this Lua state
• `LuaStateProxy.IsActorState: boolean` 
     Whether this state was created for use by Actors
• `LuaStateProxy.Event: RBXScriptSignal`
     Generic event for communication between Lua states
• `LuaStateProxy:GetActors(): { Actor }` 
     Returns all `Actor` instances associated with this Lua state
• `LuaStateProxy:Execute(source: string, ...): ()`
     Schedules code execution on this Lua state

**Added**
• `isnetworkowner`
• `getmodules`
• `protectfunction`
• `isfunctionprotected`

## UI
**Fixed**
• Auto Attach not working
• Additional performance issues and stability improvements

# Module
**New: `Console Redirection`**
- Routes `print`, `warn`, and `error` to the ISAEVA console for real-time debugging.
**Fixed**
- `hookfunction`, `newcclosure` improved
- `LuaStateProxy` improved
- Performance & stability improvements
**Added**
- `DrawingImmediate` library (faster alternative to Drawing)
- `isprotected`
- `isuntouched`
- `setuntouched`
- `checkcallstack`
- `isexecutorthread`
- `setwindowtitle`
- `setwindowicon`
- `unlockmodulescript`
# UI
**Fixed**

- Tabs polished (animations and close behavior)
- Sidebar splitter UX improved
- Clients doesnt fetch directly on Inject (injecting in homepage results in roblox avatar now, because of an small error in user id (will be fixed tmrw)
**Added:**
- Added Docked Console

## UI
**Fixed**
• Styling issues in Launcher & Roblox Account Manager
• Settings input fields (numbers/text validation corrected)
• Scripts in Hub are now forced to use a single-line description  
• Resizing issues in Settings & Launcher when shrinking to minimum window size  
**Added**
• Settings toggle inside dropdown  
• Repair Files function (restores missing/broken files properly)  
• Auto Exec: enable/disable option + “Open Folder”  
• Auto-fix on long “Authenticating” timeout
• Luau LSP to Monaco
**Improved**
• General code cleanup and improvements

Added:
- Custom Monaco Background Setting
- Docking External Console
- Bug Fixes & Improvements on UI

## UI
**Fixed**
- Dropdown now properly syncs with its animation
- Startup animation cleaned up (correct sizing, no window resize on load)
- Improved stability for auto-update / authentication flow
- Monaco Editor stabilized (color fixes + proper Luau LSP integration)
- Docking issues
- Docked Console no longer appears before startup loading completes
- Pinned state of Docked/External Console now persists correctly
- Right-clicking a file no longer automatically opens it in a tab
- Monaco no longer flashes darker when switching tabs
- Monaco background no longer flickers when switching tabs
- Monaco theme/background image flicker when switching themes fixed
- Fixed border radius on Launcher
- Fixed padding issues and improvements on Suggest Widget
- Fixed line numbers being cut off at 100+
- Fixed highlighted line overlapping the Monaco background
- Fixed Monaco right-side padding (aligned correctly to the edge)
- Fixed Monaco left-side padding (no more gap)
**Improved**
- Docked Console fade-in/fade-out animations (no leftover frame)
- Settings dropdown arrow animation sync, position stability, and color consistency
- External Console “Clear” button restyled to match gray button style
- Scrollbar slightly more transparent to better match ISAEVA style
**Changed**
- Added clear + copy button to docked console
- Removed standalone console (docked console = external console)
**Added**
- HWID can now be reset once per week via the web dashboard

## Fixed
### fixed WebView2 to use a Composition Control.
### fixed notifications.

~ Immune Was Here (That's Why It's A Bad Changelog)

## New
### Docked Console Icons
Replaced text buttons with icons in the Docked Console.

### Docked Console Animation
Added new animation for the Docked Console.

## Improved
### UI Styling
Improved styling consistency across almost the entire interface.

### Rename UX
Arrow key navigation added during file renaming.

### ScriptHub Tab Handling
Now checks for existing tabs to prevent duplicates.

## Fixed
### Account Manager Actions
"Clear all Accounts" and "Clear all Games" now work correctly.
Joining with "All Accounts" no longer fails silently.

### Monaco Editor
Fixed widespread red line rendering issue.

### Settings Changelog
"Open" no longer shows "Unable to load changelog".

### Console Toggle Sync
External Console and Dock Console states now properly sync in Settings.

### Dock Console
Fixed border issues in Client Selection view.
Error filter no longer classifies normal prints as errors.

### Unsaved Star Indicator
New files no longer show `*` without actual changes.

### Tab Drag Glitch
Dragging the first tab from the icon no longer causes visual glitches.

### Visual Bugs
Fixed random black border artifact and overlay inconsistencies.

## Updated 
### Updated to version-d599f7fc52a8404c

## Fixed 
unnamed enhancements
teleport handler freeze case
internal ui toggles not working
internal input redirection error.

## New
### What's New Overlay
Added persistent "What's New" overlay with state tracking.

### Disable What's New
Added setting to disable the "What's New" screen after updates.

### GameCard Scrolling
Added scrolling support to GameCard for user accounts.

### New Icons
Introduced new icon set and removed legacy icons.

## Improved
### UI Animations
Smooth mouse-over color transitions in XAML styles.
Unified button animations (Run, Clear, Open, Save, etc.).

### Docked Console
Refined dropdown coloring and general visual polish.

### Account Manager
Updated button colors and styling consistency.

### Login & Loading
Login and loading screens now follow the active theme color.

### App Styling Consistency
Unified styling across the entire application for consistent appearance.

## Fixed
### GameCard Hover
Fixed hover state being visually clipped in user account GameCards.

### External Console
Updated external console styling to match the new design system.

### Visual & Stability
Various color fixes and minor stability improvements.

## New
### debug.setinfo
Added debug.setinfo.

## Improved
### Execute Stability
Improved execute stability.

### Injection Stability
Improved injection stability.

### Client Session Stability
Improved client session stability.

### debug.isvalidlevel
Improved debug.isvalidlevel.

### debug.getcallstack
Improved debug.getcallstack.

### getcallbackvalue
Improved getcallbackvalue.

## Fixed
### setfpscap / getfpscap
Fixed setfpscap / getfpscap.

### getsignalwhitelist Crash
Fixed a crash related to getsignalwhitelist.

### listfiles Issue
Fixed an issue with listfiles.

### Typechecking
Fixed typechecking on several functions.

## New
### raknet Library
Added `raknet` library with send/receive hooks and packet send/receive support.

### Safe Mode
Added Safe Mode feature.

### Roblox Install Manager
Added Roblox Install Manager with downgrade support.

### ISAEVA Styled MessageBoxes
Added ISAEVA styled message boxes instead of default Windows message boxes.

### Error Notification
Added an error notification if an account in auto reconnect cannot join Roblox.

### Auto Dependency Install
Added automatic install for module or injector if a required dependency is missing.

## Improved
### UI and Parsing
Improved UI and parsing.

### Tab Spacing
Improved tab spacing.

### Multi-Instance Support
Updated Roblox mutex for multi-instance support.

### ModuleInstances Safety
Improved `ModuleInstances` add/update logic for better safety.

### Login Window
Reduced noise on the login window for better performance.

### Session & Injection Handling
Improved "No attached session found" and "Process Already Injected" handling so these issues should happen less often.

### Auto Reconnect
Improved auto reconnect to always join a different server than other accounts.

## Fixed
### listfiles
Fixed `listfiles` causing issues with configs and nested paths.

### setclipboard
Fixed `setclipboard` not supporting non-string values.

### run_on_actor
Fixed `run_on_actor` not supporting some datatypes.

### MonacoBackgroundCache
Fixed a performance issue in `MonacoBackgroundCache`.

### TargetProcess
Fixed a memory leak in `TargetProcess`.

### MessageBoxes
Fixed MessageBox issues.

### Window Frame
Fixed window frame bugs for smoother resizing.

### Console Filter
Fixed console filter issues.

### App Stability
Fixed various app-related bugs.

### Multi-Account Same Server
Fixed multiple accounts being able to join the same server through auto reconnect.

## Removed
### Performance Overlay
Removed the performance overlay.

### Split View
Removed split view from editor and tabs.

## Improved
### Tab Dragging
Improved tab dragging when clicking tabs.

## Fixed

Fixed opening selected scripts.

### Install Button Styling
Fixed install button using the correct styling.

### Session Timed Out Error
Fixed session timed out error.

## New
### Client Close Button
Added a close button (`X`) for clients.

### File Renaming
Added file renaming with double click, also in tabs.
